description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a rectangular footprint and a gable roof covered in weathered, corrugated material. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, with a concrete or stone base skirting the lower portion. The front facade features two symmetrically placed windows with wooden frames, while the side displays a single, larger window and a recessed entryway. The roof has a prominent ridge and overhangs the walls, providing some shelter to the entrance. The overall appearance suggests a simple, utilitarian structure suitable for residential use in an urban or semi-urban neighborhood.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, symmetrical front windows, and a recessed side entrance. The exterior features weathered wood planks and a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing two symmetrical windows and the main gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view with a single large window and the recessed entryway visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with two windows and no visible door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three windows and no visible entryway.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated material and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Five rectangular windows: two symmetrically placed on the front, one large window on the left side, and two on the right side, all with wooden frames and regular spacing
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the left side, recessed under the roof overhang near the rear corner
